title: Validate task IDs to prevent path traversal
description: Task IDs from CLI args or synced JSON are used in path construction without validation. A crafted ID like ../../etc/passwd could escape the tasks directory. Add validation that IDs match bl-[a-f0-9]+ before using them in paths.

notes.author: mark
notes.text: Add task ID validation to prevent path traversal. IDs must match bl-[a-f0-9]+. Validated at task_path, task_lock, worktree_path, and Task::load. cargo audit clean.
